conflict_name: Israel-Iran six-day war / Iranian air bombardment of Israel
aliases: Iranian missile and drone bombardment of Israel, 2026
family_summary: This bundle centers on Iran-inflicted air/missile bombardment of Israel during the 2026 interstate war. The published episode is a tightly bounded Beit Shemesh strike on 1 March 2026. Wider nationwide bombardment totals are reviewed as context but not forced into a DR because the exposure denominator is not yet matched.
notes: Conflict end_date is the research cut-off date for this bundle, not a claim that hostilities ended on 11 March 2026. Central path uses victim_side = Israel and inflicting_side = Iran.
